phases.name: the read-only /philosophies surface surfaces each seed's aliases (viewer parity with slice-31)

steps.name: render the aliases line in each /philosophies vocabulary entry
steps.description: slice-31 made the CLI `philosophy list` surface each seed's `aliases: <joined>`, but the read-only viewer `/philosophies` browse surface (slice-27) still renders only NAME + DESCRIPTION + traversal link — so the alias strings that power triangulation (D4) are undiscoverable in the browser (D5: the viewer is the read-only browse of the vocabulary). Append an `aliases: <joined>` line to each entry in render_philosophy_entry (crates/viewer-domain/src/philosophies.rs), rendered only when the seed has aliases. Bare comma-separated alias strings (mirroring the CLI slice-31 render_seed_block convention) as plain text — NOT alias object-ids and NOT links — so the slice-27 traversal-href checks (name links to /philosophy?object=<object-id>) and the object-id-form guarantees are untouched. Pure renderer change: no store read, no network, no authoring control (I-VIEW-1/3 preserved).
criteria: OWNED every_seed_renders_its_aliases_on_the_philosophies_surface (viewer-domain unit pin: each seed's exact `aliases: <joined>` line renders in its entry; a no-alias seed renders no empty label)
ACCEPTANCE the_philosophies_surface_surfaces_seed_aliases (GET /philosophies body carries an `aliases:` label and the unambiguous `mem-safety` alias)

GUARDRAIL the_philosophies_surface_lists_the_complete_seed_vocabulary + the_philosophies_surface_lists_the_vocabulary_with_traversal_links stay green (every seed's name + /philosophy?object= traversal href unchanged)
GUARDRAIL the_philosophies_surface_exposes_no_authoring_control + viewer_philosophies_invariants (no executable control, stays offline with no external asset, nav SSOT) stay green
steps.implementation_notes:
render_philosophy_entry appends `p { "aliases: " (seed.aliases.join(", ")) }` only when `!seed.aliases.is_empty()` (a no-alias seed renders no empty `

`). Aliases render as bare plain text inside the entry `

`, never as `` links and never NSID-prefixed object-ids — so the traversal href stays the name-only link and slice-27's object-id/href assertions are unaffected. NO authoring/mutating markup added (no `
`/`

validation.review_verdict: SHIPPED — single-step pure-renderer viewer parity for slice-31. RED demonstrated before GREEN (memory-safety entry lacked its aliases line); 1 owned viewer-domain pin (+ aliasless no-empty-label pin) + 1 acceptance scenario green. Mirrors the CLI alias line onto the read-only /philosophies browse surface (D4 aliases / D5 read-only browse). slice-27 vocabulary/traversal/no-authoring/offline/nav-SSOT invariants preserved by rendering bare alias TEXT only (no links, no object-ids); domain exact-?object=-count unchanged. No crate/route/dep change; check-arch stays 21.
